mainText: Today's top stories: HP accelerates enterprise workflows with OpenAI Frontier Frontier, Taiwan raids Super Micro offices in probe, Why do South Koreans love AI so much?, A startup claims it broke through a bottleneck, Anthropic’s latest feud with the government continues, OpenAI's Jalapeño chip was created by an algorithm, US military used AI to pick thousands, Meta restricts use of Claude Code and Codex, XAI fired engineer who raised alarms about Grok, Amazon borrows $17.5B from banks as AI spending
